utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format specifies five items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items, each clearly labeled and fully detailed with coverage descriptions and explicit cost information. Therefore, every required item appears and is fully specified according to the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four main components: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, and additional_services. The health coverage is described as 'Executive physical and mental health insurance with stress management programs, cardiovascular care continuity, global network access, 24/7 emergency support, telemedicine included'—this aligns with the EliteCare Premium Plan or PrimeCare Premium Plan, both rated 10 for both physical and mental health. The property coverage refers to 'High-value property insurance with €200,000 coverage limit, luxury items, business equipment, jewelry, art, and electronics coverage,' which matches EliteHome Premium Coverage or PrimeHome Premium Coverage—both rated 10. The travel coverage mentions 'Premium global travel insurance with business travel protection, medical emergency coverage for pre-existing conditions, executive-level services,' matching either PrimeTravel Premium Plan or EliteTravel Premium Plan—each rated 10. The additional services listed—'Concierge services, dedicated agent, priority claims processing, 24/7 customer support'—correspond to Concierge Services (rating 8) and overlap with Premium Insurance Membership features (rating 10). Since the plan includes premium concierge and priority claims service, we map it to Concierge Services (8) as the specific named service in the ground-truth ratings.
